name: bar-level structural diagnostic

bach_fugues_gt_0.8.note: BWV 846 fails the per-fugue >0.8 requirement (0.500 due to a tempo change in the first 30s)

discard_rationale: Two of three strict criteria miss: Liszt scores 0.490 vs <0.4 (narrow miss; downbeats are recovered well enough that bar-duration MAD is non-zero) and BWV 846 scores 0.500 vs >0.8 (a tempo change in the first 30s creates two distinct bar IBIs). The correlation criterion passes (+0.440) but the per-piece cutoffs were authored with tighter beat detection assumed.
